hero.text:
I posted at noon that the winning bettors we track are leaning Belgium tonight — and that I'd sat on it for an hour because I didn't love fading my own country in a knockout game.

I feel a lot better about it now.
hero.rtLine: I feel a lot better about it now.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: Board check since a few people asked: the lean is still Belgium, 9 of the 16 proven wallets with a position. It stays live until 15 minutes before kickoff — if the money flips, the board flips, and I'll post it. nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0706t
